codebaristaRevocationRequest.headline: Revocation
codebaristaRevocationRequest.intro: Use this form to revoke your contract. We will process your request as soon as possible.
codebaristaRevocationRequest.privacyNotice: I have read and understood the Privacy Policy.
codebaristaRevocationRequest.successMessage: We have received your revocation request and will process it as soon as possible.
codebaristaRevocationRequest.errorMessage: An error occurred while sending your request. Please try again later.
codebaristaRevocationRequest.rateLimited: Too many requests. Please try again in a few minutes.
